old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ku5","title":"Make C TX queue reads thread-safe","description":"tx_queue_count, tx_queue_empty, and tx_queue_stats_get read shared queue state without locking despite the thread-safe API contract; POSIX mutations can race and cause undefined behavior.
